generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on motor shaft"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SinumerikDataStream
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SinumerikDataStream
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SinumerikDataStream
]

instance SinumerikDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current measurements from SINUMERIK 840D sl controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SinumerikDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SinumerikDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity data derived from position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SinumerikDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration data derived from velocity measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SinumerikDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque measurements derived from motor current and gearbox parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SinumerikDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SinumerikDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of gearwheel component"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb and viscous friction model for joint friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for low-velocity dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for dynamic friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for complex friction phenomena"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tools for structural system analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulating motor, gearwheel, and gearbox models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance SinumerikControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:enables TraceabilityService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard software for visualizing robot axis data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural analysis using SysML Block and Internal Block Diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:provides SysMLModelingInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time transmission of sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification and analysis of joint friction using white-box and black-box models for motion accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionDynamicsInsight, FrictionModelParameterUpdateAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization for understanding physical relationships in robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data and model traceability for verification and validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityInsight
]

instance SysMLModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural understanding of robot first axis components and relationships"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirms successful data transmission and synchronization between physical and virtual systems"
]

instance JointFrictionDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into joint friction dynamics for improving motion control accuracy"
]

instance FrictionModelParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic updates to friction model parameters based on real-time data comparison"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of friction dynamics and system behavior for analysis"
]

instance TraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ensures traceability of data and models throughout the digital twin lifecycle"
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot for machining tasks with positional accuracy of 0.1 mm and functional reach of 2 m"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital shadow does not transmit data back to the physical system as it is a passive entity with one-way data flow"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with live sensor data streaming; friction model identification occurs continuously during robot operation"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Single digital shadow instance integrating SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, live sensor data via MQTT, AAS for traceability, and dashboard visualization for friction analysis and motion accuracy improvement"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated) focusing on real-time monitoring and friction analysis during active robot use"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data against measured data; multi-physics models address wear and environmental changes; uncertainty managed via continuous identification during operation"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "SysML for modeling, Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards, and RFLP methodology for system engineering"
]
